description_long: This is a classic American football with an elongated spheroid shape, constructed from brown textured leather. The surface features prominent pebble-grain texturing for enhanced grip, and a visible white lacing runs along one seam, used for throwing accuracy. The football displays the Wilson brand name and an NFL logo in gold and black, indicating its association with professional play. The stitching is visible along the seams, and the ball shows some signs of use, such as minor scuffs and slight discoloration. The overall appearance is robust and built for outdoor play, typical for use in parks, streets, or sports fields.
description: A brown, textured leather American football with white laces, Wilson branding, and an NFL logo, showing minor signs of use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white laces, Wilson branding, and NFL logo prominently on the textured brown surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted brown leather surface with visible seam and barcode.
description_view_2: Opposite seam view displaying the full length of the football with no laces or branding visible, just the textured leather.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing partial laces, Wilson branding, and NFL logo, with the pebble-grain texture clearly visible.
